details: Medisports went 6 wins and 1 loss in Nova Prime Championship Stage 2 to qualify for Stage 3. The only loss was to Isaiah, 1:18.

title: Sold Hunglow

title: Nova Prime Championship Stage 3 Group G
details: Lost to TSB in upper bracket and Innercia in lower bracket.
notes: Because of those two losses, Medisports qualified for Nova Prime Challengers Season 10. If they had won those matches, they would have qualified for Nova Prime Championship Season 10 instead.

title: Nova Prime Challengers Season 10 group finish
details: Finished bottom of groups in Nova Prime Challengers Season 10.
notes: This was the season's Major. Stage 3 was the Major, so the team were super happy with the result.

notes: Season starts 7 days after final league match.

title: World ranking improved
details: World ranking improved from 97th to 93rd.
notes: Ranking changes occur on first day of season.

title: bonk mental breakdown
details: bonk had a mental breakdown.
notes: What was meant to be Medisports’ long-term planned rebuild finally went live at the start of Season 11, but when the moment came, bonk appeared to crack under the reality of it.

title: bonk moved into main lineup as IGL
details: bonk moved into the main lineup as IGL.
notes: bonk and stroky had both been signed seasons earlier with the long-term idea that they could eventually become part of Medisports’ next main-team rebuild.

title: stroky moved into main lineup
details: stroky moved into the main lineup.
notes: The plan was for bonk to step into the IGL role and for stroky to move into the active lineup as part of a fresh system reset.

title: bonk left unexpectedly on medical leave
details: bonk left unexpectedly on unknown medical leave and was believed to have retired at 22.

title: stroky stood by bonk
details: stroky stood by bonk during the situation.
notes: With stroky standing by bonk, Grev was forced into an emergency three-day reshuffle at the very start of the season.

title: Barry Snail article released: Medisports Roster Misfire
details: Barry Snail’s article framed the first three days of Season 11 as a planned rebuild collapsing at the moment of execution, forcing Grev into an emergency reshuffle just in time for the first league and ladder games.
notes: Reaction / retrospective article released after the events it covered.

title: Bought GrabseN
details: Bought ⓜ | GrabseN from Free agent for CPL 33,429.
notes: One of the emergency pickups to replace bonk and stroky after the crisis.

title: Bought Leon
details: Bought ⓜ | Leon from Free agent for CPL 5,000.
notes: One of the emergency pickups to replace bonk and stroky after the crisis.

title: First ladder win of Season 11

notes: First ladder win of Season 11.

title: First league win of Season 11

notes: First league win of Season 11.

title: GrabseN replaced stroky
details: GrabseN was brought in to replace stroky.

title: Leon became new IGL
details: Leon was brought in as the new IGL because of the bonk situation.
notes: Leon is not labeled as PAX Leon in the timeline.

title: No public information released about bonk breakdown
details: No public information was released about the bonk breakdown.

notes: Connected to the breakdown situation.

details: After long internal discussions, stroky was benched.
